sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111436" key="filoprwteu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλοπρωτ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n111436.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wish</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strive to be first,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">3 Ep.Jo.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
